calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account (Minor: Sydni Michelle Boice)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Tyson Redenbarger Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Vinetta Boice, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Sydni Michelle Boice, appeared via Telephone Conferece by Coutcall.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $33,402.99
Attorney's Fees: $13,194.65 payable to Hooshmand Law Group.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to thir parties in the tota amount of: $416.36.
Total allowance for fees and expenes from the settlement of judgment: $13,611.01

A net balance of $19,791.98 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank 929 W Sunset Blvd. St George, UT 84770 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 15, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Vacated

Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No apperances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFFs JOSHUA DAY, TAVIA BORGHI, ARTHUR CUMMINGS, CARRIE CRAWFORD and KARI BENJAMIN's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Stipulation and Order signed 2/23/14. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
